assertions.assertion: Creates a static RsaSecurityKey using RSA.Create(2048) or similar
assertions.rationale: RSA key generation for testing is standard .NET security knowledge

assertions.assertion: The CreateAccessToken method accepts subject, audience, and claims parameters
assertions.rationale: Standard token creation patterns include these parameters

assertions.assertion: Uses SecurityTokenDescriptor and JsonWebTokenHandler (or JwtSecurityTokenHandler) to create the token
The WebApplicationFactory replaces JWT Bearer options with TokenValidationParameters that set IssuerSigningKey to the test key
assertions.rationale: Standard pattern for overriding JWT validation in tests

assertions.assertion: Sets ValidAudience to 'my-api' in the token validation parameters
assertions.rationale: Without skill, an LLM might forget to set the specific audience or use a different value
